title: Automate sending "secure email address" for updates
excerpt:
I couldn’t find something specifically about this already addressed… 
I would like to automate Monday to send a message to an assignee requesting that they provide feedback in the form of an item update. I’d like to send…

posts.author: Eric_At_Rooftop (Eric Wood)
posts.cookedHtml:
I couldn’t find something specifically about this already addressed…

I would like to automate Monday to send a message to an assignee requesting that they provide feedback in the form of an item update. I’d like to send the email link to do that as not all of our assignees are Monday users nor are they all within the organization.

So, they’d get an email that says "please send an email with your update to “this address” where “this address” is the secure “update via email” address for that item.

I can’t find a way to automatically send that address out.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Eric,

Let me know if this helps!

You can obtain the updates email address here:

Screen Shot 2023-08-22 at 4.21.47 pm1392×964 60.8 KB

And copy the email address into an email column in your board/item:

Screen Shot 2023-08-22 at 4.21.53 pm932×490 16.7 KB

This way, when setting up the automation to notify the specific user, you can include that email column in the notify/email field of the automation:

Screen Shot 2023-08-22 at 4.23.45 pm1262×1012 55.1 KB

Is this along the lines of what you’re looking to achieve?

posts.author: Eric_At_Rooftop (Eric Wood)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you. Yes. I know where to obtain the email address, but I’d like to automate that rather then having to manually copy and paste for each item. I’m guessing that’s not currently possible so that would make this a feature request.

posts.author: jcebina (Jody Cebina)
posts.cookedHtml: Adding this as a feature would be an excellent addition and time saver.

posts.author: Gareth_Parkes (Gareth Parkes)
posts.cookedHtml: Came here looking for a solution to this exact problem, did you have nay joy following this?

posts.author: krenaud (Katie)
posts.cookedHtml: We would love to see this feature too as having to manually copy and paste every item’s email into an Email column is onerous and leaves room for user error when it could be a field to select within automations.
